name: hestim-planner
description: HESTIM Planner — Système de planification des emplois du temps (Projet PACTE)

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend && npm install --prefix electron
scripts.electron:dev: cross-env NODE_ENV=development concurrently "npm run backend:dev" "npm run frontend" "wait-on http://localhost:5173 && cd electron && npm start"
scripts.electron:build: npm run build && cd electron && npm run build
scripts.electron:build:win: npm run build && cd electron && npm run build:win
scripts.electron:build:linux: npm run build && cd electron && npm run build:linux
